strategy: Huge Sun boss (39680) that gets stronger every round via a Polymorph cycle (+5% damage, pierce, and resist per stage, up to +50%). This is a race, so set up efficiently and burst.
Hit with Ice, Storm, or Death (+5%); avoid Fire, Myth, and Life (70% resist). Funnel blades to one hitter.
Cast Feints only on round 1, while his Trash minions are not active yet. After that, a Feint (or Mass Feint) makes a minion shift the trap onto itself.
He Steal-Healths his own minions to heal himself and re-summons Trash whenever he runs out. Do not chase minions endlessly; AoE them alongside him.
Because he escalates, plan your kill window early. Over-stack blades and traps on the hitter and drop one massive hit before his auras stack too high.
cheatNotes: A late joiner makes him summon an extra minion, Steal Health, and jump a polymorph stage (stronger). Everyone in on time.
With no minions out he Steal-Healths a random wizard instead, healing himself. Expect self-healing either way.
Feint him after round 1 and a minion shifts the trap onto itself. Cast Feints only on round 1 while minions are still inactive.
Mass Feint triggers the same trap-dodge. Same rule: round 1 only.
Round 1 he summons one Trash minion per wizard. Bring AoE to manage the board.
He sacrifices his own minions with Steal Health to heal 100% of the damage dealt. His minions are healing batteries, so AoE them with him rather than one at a time.
Whenever he is out of minions he summons another, so you cannot fully clear the board. Focus the boss.
He Polymorphs into bigger forms that trade his stats for escalating damage, pierce, and resist auras. The fight gets harder each stage, so win quickly.
Stage 1 aura is +5% damage, pierce, and resist. Every stage adds more, so treat the clock as your enemy.
By the later stages he is at +30% and climbing to +50%. If the fight has run this long, reset your setup and commit to a kill.
